features: Keeps working for up to 48 hours for maximum confidence
description: Product Description Right Guard Total Defence 5 combines the five essential benefits of an anti-perspirant into one. It fights perspiration, prevents odour, long-lasting freshness, adapts to your level of activity and leaves low residue. Delivers 30% more protection power and 30% more active ingredients delivered per second compared to Right Guard 3D. Ingredients Butane, Propane, Aqua, Aluminum Chlorohydrate, Propylene Glycol, Cyclomethicone, Isobutane, Isopropyl Myristate, Dimethicone, Parfum, PEG/PPG-18/18 Dimethicone, Phenoxyethanol, Limonene, Linalool, Hexyl Cinnamal, Citral, Coumarin, Benzyl Alcohol, Geraniol Safety Warning Danger: Pressurised container: May bursts if heated. Keep away from heat, hot surfaces, sparks, open flames and other ignition sources. No smoking. Do not spray on an open flame or other ignition source. Do not pierce or burn, even after use. Protect from sunlight. Do not expose to temperatures exceeding 50°C. Keep out of reach of children. Read label before use. Use in well ventilated places. Do not spray into eyes. Solvent Abuse Can Kill Instantly. Extremely flammable aerosol. Box Contains 1 x Right Guard Women Total Defence 5 Invisible Anti-Perspirant Deodorant Aerosol, 250 ml (Pack of 6) See more
